spec.name: An Intersection In The Light Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the forest. A path leads north to a small field and other paths lead east and west into the dense forest.

north.description: The path leads north to a small, grassy field.

east.description: The path leads east to a dense part of the forest.

west.description: The path leads west to a dense part of the forest.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The tall trees are young and slender, not much more than a hundred years or so.
